signals.headline: Trump Expected to Sign Cryptocurrency Market Structure Bill Before April | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Expected to Sign Cryptocurrency Market Structure Bill Before April | YES | HIGH confidence**  
White House officials confirmed President Trump is expected to sign the cryptocurrency market structure bill before April, as stated by The Bitcoin Historian and multiple sources[3]. This regulatory clarity could boost Bitcoin adoption and move prediction markets on crypto legislation outcomes.
matched_markets: Will Trump agree to Iranian enrichment of uranium in April?

signals.headline: US Senator Cynthia Lummis Confirmed as Bitcoin 2026 Speaker | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US Senator Cynthia Lummis Confirmed as Bitcoin 2026 Speaker | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Senator Lummis, Chair of the Senate Banking Subcommittee on Digital Assets, is confirmed to speak at Bitcoin 2026 (April 27–29, Las Vegas), with her prediction that the crypto market structure bill advances from committee by late April 2026[4]. Her involvement signals advancing US crypto policy momentum.

signals.headline: Powell Confirms He Will Remain Fed Chair Pro Tem Until Successor Confirmed Amid Ongoing Investigation** | NO | HIGH conf
signals.raw:
Powell Confirms He Will Remain Fed Chair Pro Tem Until Successor Confirmed Amid Ongoing Investigation** | NO | HIGH confidence[1][2][4]

Jerome Powell stated he will stay as chair pro tem if his successor is not confirmed by the end of his term (May 2026), per legal provisions, and has no intention of leaving the Fed Board until a criminal investigation concludes with transparency[1][2][4].  
Pres
